title: Frontend Engineer (Mid-Level)
description:
We are seeking a skilled Frontend Engineer to join our team. As a mid-level engineer, you will be responsible for developing high-quality web applications using React.js, JavaScript, and TypeScript. You will work closely with our design team to translate designs into functional and visually appealing user interfaces.

Responsibilities:
- Develop responsive web applications using React.js, JavaScript, and TypeScript
- Collaborate with designers to implement visually appealing user interfaces
- Work with backend engineers to integrate APIs and ensure seamless data flow
- Test and debug code to ensure high-quality deliverables
- Participate in code reviews and contribute to the improvement of the codebase
- Stay up-to-date with the latest frontend development trends and best practices

Must-have skills:
- JavaScript
- TypeScript
- React.js
- HTML
- CSS
- Jest
- Webpack
- Git

Nice to have:
- Redux
- GraphQL
- Docker
